# EventForMe

> EventForMe is an independent bilingual media platform covering weddings and events in Russia and globally — stylish ideas, planning guides, traditions, honeymoon travel, beauty, and astrology for couples and wedding professionals. Published at https://event4me.vip.

## Key Sections

- [Home — Russian](https://event4me.vip/ru): Main landing page with featured and latest articles, rubric highlights, and author showcase.
- [Home — English](https://event4me.vip/en): English-language version of the homepage.
- [All Articles](https://event4me.vip/ru/articles): Full paginated list of all published articles, sortable by date.
- [All Rubrics](https://event4me.vip/ru/rubrics): Index of all editorial rubrics on the site.
- [All Authors](https://event4me.vip/ru/authors): Directory of authors and illustrators who contribute to EventForMe.
- [Search](https://event4me.vip/ru/search): Full-text search across all articles.

## Rubrics

- [Ideas & Inspiration](https://event4me.vip/ru/ideas): Wedding style ideas, mood boards, and creative concepts.
- [Astrology & Mysticism](https://event4me.vip/ru/mystic): Horoscopes, auspicious wedding dates, and astrological guidance.
- [People & Events](https://event4me.vip/ru/people): Interviews with creative personalities and event reviews.
- [Wedding Planning](https://event4me.vip/ru/planning): Practical planning guides, checklists, and vendor advice.
- [Traditions](https://event4me.vip/ru/traditions): Wedding customs and rituals from Russia and around the world.
- [Honeymoon & Travel](https://event4me.vip/ru/travel): Destination guides and honeymoon inspiration.
- [Beauty & Wellness](https://event4me.vip/ru/wellness): Bridal beauty, skincare, and wellness preparation.
- [Wedding Encyclopedia](https://event4me.vip/ru/wiki): Reference articles explaining wedding terminology and concepts.

## Content Structure

Articles are organised into rubrics (broad editorial sections) and tagged with categories (cross-cutting topics). Each article has a dedicated page at `/{lang}/{rubricSlug}/{articleSlug}`. Author pages are at `/{lang}/authors/{authorSlug}`. The site is bilingual: Russian (`ru`) is the canonical language; English (`en`) translations are available for most articles.

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://event4me.vip/ru/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Use](https://event4me.vip/ru/terms)

## Optional

- Sitemap: https://event4me.vip/sitemap.xml
- RSS: not available
